text: Welcome to Pain Science & Activity Pacing - Occupational Therapy Staff Training! This course is asynchronous with one live project presentation session. All materials are in Modules 1-5. Reach out to me (Frank) with any questions - frank.schultz@Finthesiss.ai
Reminder: Module 2 Activity Pacing worksheet is due Feb 5. If you'd like to preview the Finthesiss.ai pacing tool referenced in Module 3, I can share a walkthrough link - just email me.

Great turnout for project presentations last Friday! I'm compiling the Finthesiss.ai feedback from Module 3 assignments to send to Sasha Amin. Excellent professional insights - our team's perspective matters for how this tool gets built.

Welcome, Jasmine! Excited to have you for Level II fieldwork at Bitterroot Rehab. Please submit your learning objectives by Friday May 9. Our first formal supervision meeting is scheduled for May 16 at 8am. See you Monday!

Jasmine - great midterm check-in. Your FWPE scores are right on track. I've posted written feedback under the Midterm Competency assignment. Let's discuss your pain science reflection outline at our next supervision meeting June 13.

privacy Annual Training 2026 is now live. All professional staff must complete the attestation by January 31. Estimated time: 45 minutes. If you have questions about private data handling in our new remote coaching workflows, contact Beth Rivers or bring them to the Occupational Therapy team standup.

Splinting lab materials are stocked in Occupational Therapy Support Room 2. Please sign up for a 2-hour lab slot using the scheduling link in the sidebahr. Supervisors (Frank and Dr. Tran) will be present to sign off competency checklists.

remote coaching platform training is now open. All staff need proficiency certification before April 1 per new Bitterroot Rehab policy. The quiz and practice session note assignment must be submitted together. Reach out to me or Dr. Trần with platform access issues.
Module 4 (Therapeutic Use of Occupation) is now open. The short reflection is due Feb 27. I've posted Moseley's biopsychosocial slides under Materials - start there before writing.
Quick reminder: the Module 1 Central Sensitization concept check is due Jan 21. It's only 20 points and takes about 10 minutes - please don't skip it, it sets up everything in Module 2.

Cohort discussion thread is live under Module 2 - share one reference of activity pacing from your current workload (de-identified, please). I'll jump in with a few of my own. Participation counts toward your completion.

Optional enrichment: I've added a curated pain science podcast list under Materials. Great for your commute. The 'Tame the Beast' video is also a fantastic participant-facing resource - feel free to use it in clinic.

Jasmine - your support session plan assignment is posted under Week 5-8. Use the template I added to Materials. Bring a draft to our June 13 supervision meeting and we'll refine the pacing strategy together.

Heads up: the Final FWPE self-rating is now drafted and will open after our Week 8 check-in. The entry-level competency rubric is posted under Materials so you know exactly what we're assessing. No surprises at the finish line.

Part 2 of the privacy training (remote coaching Privacy & Breach Reporting) is now available, along with a short scenario quiz due Jan 31. With our expanding remote coaching workflows this section is especially important this year.

Unit 2 (Dynamic Splinting) is open. The finger extension assist competency checklist is due March 28. Outrigger geometry guide is under Materials. Lab Room 2 sign-ups are in the sidebahr - Frank or Dr. Tran will sign off.

Thermoplastic stock has been replenished in Support Room 2. If we run low again, let me know and I'll put in the North Coast Medical order. Great work on the resting hand splints, everyone - fit quality is improving across the board.

Part 2 of remote coaching training (Documentation & Billing) is now live with a quiz due March 30. Review the CPT cheat sheet under Materials before attempting it. Questions on billing codes can go to me or Dr. Trần.

Reminder: remote coaching proficiency certification closes April 1. If you have not completed both the platform quiz and the documentation quiz, please finish this week. Reach out if you need a platform login reset.

Final reminder for the cohort: the Module 5 project study presentations are this Friday. Keep everything de-identified per privacy. I'll compile the professional strengths you surface and pass the best insights along to Sasha Amin at Finthesiss.ai. Thank you all for a great training cycle.
